## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My entry follows the required format: `**[Name](URL)** — Description.`
- [ ] The link works and points to the official source.
- [ ] The resource is not already listed (searched with Ctrl+F).
- [ ] The resource is related to Arabic AI/NLP.
- [ ] The description is concise (under 25 words) and ends with a period.
- [ ] The entry is placed in the correct section and logical order.
- [ ] I have made only one focused change (one resource per PR is preferred).
